title: Jade Addons (Fabric)
description: Jade 🔍's additional mod supports for Fabric
body:
# Jade Addons (Fabric)

This mod adds mod integration for [Jade 🔍](https://modrinth.com/mod/jade) 1.18+.

### Currently supports:

- General
  - Require a custom item in hand or equipped to use Jade
- Create
  - Accurate contraption ray-casting and show actual block at the contraption
  - Contraption inventory
  - Blaze burner fuel information
  - Crafting blueprint result item
  - Placard item
  - No longer ignore curved track
  - IO-filter information
  - Hide super glue entity
  - Backtank air level
  - Integrate goggles tooltip in Jade (disabled by default)
- Lootr
  - Player-based inventory
  - Refresh and decay time
- Modern Industrialization
  - Energy
  - Cable & pipe information
- Supplementaries
  - Camouflage trapped presents
  - Hide items in present or doormat
- Artifacts
  - Camouflage mimic monster

### Modpack Policy

You are allowed to add this mod to your modpack, as long as the modpack is only published on CurseForge or Modrinth.
